texto: I’m turned on by women who are comfortable in their own skin
autor: and I’m turned off by those who are uncomfortable in their own shoes.
explicacao: Citação de and I’m turned off by those who are uncomfortable in their own shoes. sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “I’m turned on by women who are comfortable in their own skin” articula reflexao, mokokoma-mokhonoana, turned em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
